description: Lumenwave AI, a fully distributed team building voice agents for logistics, raised a $4.2M seed led by Uncork Capital. The founders are based in Austin and Lisbon and plan to stay remote-first as they scale.
Fernbank Robotics closed an $18M Series A to build its new 40,000 sq ft manufacturing facility in Detroit, where its 90-person team is based.

Northloop Health, a telehealth compliance startup, filed a Form D for a $3.1M raise. Founders previously worked remotely at two other digital health startups; no office address listed beyond a registered agent in Wyoming.
Cascade Freight Analytics (YC S26) raised $5.5M. The two co-founders are fully remote, one in Denver and one in Toronto, and plan to hire a distributed team.
Ironvale Capital Partners raised a $60M Series B and announced a new 100-person office in NYC's Flatiron district.
Palefire Studio, an indie game studio, filed a Form D for $900K. Registered agent in Delaware; founders self-describe as 'remote by default' on their careers page.
Briarcliff Legal Tech (YC W26) raised $2.8M to build compliance software for law firms. Team of 4, fully remote across three states, incorporated in Delaware.
Summitgrain Foods raised $22M to expand its Ohio production facility and grocery distribution network.
Driftline Analytics filed a Form D for a $3.9M raise. No physical office listed; registered agent in Wyoming, founders based in Seattle and Berlin.
Marrow Biotech raised $45M for its wet-lab facility expansion in Cambridge, MA.
